title: HEB US Scraper input
description: Scrape HEB.com product price, stock, and title.

url.title: Product URL
url.description: Product/listing URL on heb.com (or product ID for HEB/AliExpress).

region.title: Region
region.description: Marketplace region code used by Seller Pilot Hub.

maxRetries.title: Max retries
maxRetries.description: Number of extra attempts after the first request fails.

productId.title: Product ID (optional)
productId.description: Optional for AliExpress/HEB when URL is missing.
